name: French Apple Pie 3
recipeIngredient: 3 tart apples, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and bake the crust according to recipe instructions. (See Light & Flaky Pie Crust recipe). Set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F.
3. In a 2-quart saucepan, simmer applesauce, honey, brandy (if desired), vanilla extract, and lemon zest over medium-high heat until quite thick, about 10 to 15 minutes.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
5. Arrange the sliced apples in concentric circles on top of the sauce.
6. In a 1-quart saucepan, melt apricot jam over medium-high heat.
7. Use a sieve to press the melted apricot jam through.
8. Glaze the apples with the jam using a pastry brush.
9. Bake for 30 minutes before slicing.
